perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a male creator, 3cTim, wearing a flat cap and glasses, speaking directly to the camera in a brightly lit indoor setting. A floating graphic of a silver smartphone with dual cameras is shown. (2) Chronological montage of previous Samsung Edge models (Note Edge, S6 Edge, S7 Edge) appears on screen. (3) Transition to a crowded event hall where many people are holding up smartphones to record a display. The creator is seen in the crowd, looking surprised and gesturing. (4) Close-up shots of the silver Galaxy S25 Edge on a thin metal stand, showing its extremely slim profile from the side and the rear camera module. (5) 3cTim meets another creator, Joeman, and they discuss the phone's thickness while standing in the event lobby. (6) The video ends with 3cTim back in the initial studio setting, summarizing his thoughts and gesturing with two fingers.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat electronic background music (BGM) starts immediately. A male voice (3cTim) speaks with an excited and professional tone in Mandarin. (2) The soundscape shifts to include field recording ambient noise from a large event, featuring background chatter and the faint sound of many people talking. (3) A second male voice (Joeman) enters, engaging in a dialogue with 3cTim; their conversation is high-pitched and enthusiastic. (4) The BGM remains consistent in the background throughout the dialogue, with the volume slightly ducked to prioritize the vocals. (5) The video concludes with the BGM fading out as 3cTim finishes his final sentence.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Subtitles in Traditional Chinese throughout the video translating the spoken content. (2) Decorative Text: Social media handles '@3ctim' and '3c有意思tim哥' appear in the top-left corner. (3) Hook Text: Large text overlays like 'Galaxy S25 Edge', '彩蛋' (Easter Egg), and '超級薄!' (Super Thin!) appear to emphasize key points. (4) Labeling Text: Text identifying 'Joeman' and '戰場' (Battlefield) during the crowd scenes.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Historical Recap -> Event On-site Footage -> Expert Interview -> Outro

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator (3cTim), 1 secondary creator (Joeman), at least 13 distinct people visible in the event crowd background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: 3cTim: Middle-aged male, wearing a grey/brown plaid flat cap, glasses, and a white t-shirt. Joeman: Young male, wearing a brown jacket and carrying camera equipment.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Starts in a clean indoor studio with a blurred wall; shifts to a large stadium-like event venue with tiered seating and a product display stage; then a bright convention center lobby.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Bright studio lighting and professional event stage lighting.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Historical Context -> Product Reveal -> Peer Validation -> Summary
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To generate hype and provide a first-look review of the Samsung Galaxy S25 Edge, emphasizing its design innovation (thickness) by comparing it to past models and validating it through on-site experience and peer influencer opinions.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator is attending a major brand event (Samsung Unpacked), showcasing the product in a positive light, and using promotional graphics/titles provided by the brand environment.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Creator's signature flat cap and glasses; inclusion of other well-known tech influencers like Joeman for cross-promotion.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video uses a high-energy 'breaking news' style common in tech vlogging to capture viewer attention during major product launches.
